creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 189292
svn diff for www/mod_dav_svn

The www/mod_dav_svn currently sets USE_APACHE after including Makefile.common from the master port.
Makefile.common includes bsd.port.pre.mk
This creates an error when using the upcoming bsd.apache.mk USES replacemenet (Mk/Uses/apache.mk). The patch works with Mk/Uses/apache.mk, have not tested it yet with the existing bsd.apache.mk

```
www/mod_dav_svn: Don't set USE_* after bsd.port.pre.mk


PR:
Submitted by: brnrd (with hat apache@)

```
